summary: W1424 syncs the required negative fixtures into the review packet so the immutable contract audit no longer reports missing packet fixture blockers. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: ProductSuccessDeclarations only checks the bounded-derived name without an original-four-task completion witness.
OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations lacks the original-four-task completion witness.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
remaining_work: Build and expose the original four-task completion witness in Lean, then tighten ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations around that witness.
Continue the downstream Lean route increments after W1423 where they contribute to the original four-task witness surface.
